feature_name: Azure AD Authentication Required for Data Plane Access
notes: feature_supported=False; ADDDS IS the Azure AD Domain Services identity provider — it is not a consumer of AAD auth; it provides Kerberos/LDAP for domain members; not_applicable at AAD DS service level | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud - Adaptive Application Controls
notes: feature_supported=Not Applicable; Adaptive Application Controls targets VMs; ADDDS is a PaaS managed domain service; not_applicable

feature_name: Service Credential and Secrets Support Integration and Storage in Azure Key Vault
notes: feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS does not expose service credentials for Key Vault storage; fully Microsoft-managed; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS is a PaaS managed service; underlying compute anti-malware is Microsoft-managed; not_applicable at ADDDS resource level
feature_supported=Not Applicable; anti-malware health monitoring applies to customer-managed VMs; ADDDS PaaS service not applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; Azure Automation DSC targets customer VMs; ADDDS managed nodes not configurable via customer Automation accounts; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; Update Management targets customer-owned VMs; ADDDS managed service patching is Microsoft-owned; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS does not use Azure Backup service; Microsoft-managed native backup covers domain state; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; Guest Configuration Agent targets customer VMs; ADDDS managed nodes not accessible for guest config; not_applicable

microsoft_managed: Azure Policy governance applies via tags and resource properties; customer cannot configure directly on the ADDDS PaaS control | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS management plane uses ARM RBAC; data plane (domain join, LDAP queries) uses Kerberos/NTLM auth, not Azure RBAC; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_name: Certificate Management in Azure Key Vault
notes: feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS does not use Key Vault for certificate lifecycle management; LDAPS certificate is customer-provided but not Key Vault-managed; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; Conditional Access evaluates Entra ID sign-in; ADDDS data plane uses Kerberos/NTLM not Entra interactive auth; not_applicable

feature_supported=False; Customer Lockbox not supported for ADDDS; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline
feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS does not run customer container workloads; not_applicable
feature_supported=Not Applicable; ADDDS domain controllers run Microsoft-managed images; customer cannot supply VM images; not_applicable

feature_name: Data at Rest Encryption Using CMK
notes: feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not support Customer-Managed Keys for data at rest; Microsoft-managed encryption only; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_name: Data at Rest Encryption Using Platform Keys
notes: microsoft_managed: platform-enforced, enabled by default, not customer-configurable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

microsoft_managed: ADDDS enforces LDAPS (TCP 636) and Kerberos over TLS for data in transit; platform-configured; customers must configure LDAPS cert but TLS is enforced | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not support DLP controls at the service level; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_name: Microsoft Defender for Service / Product Offering
notes: feature_supported=False; no Microsoft Defender plan for ADDDS as a service; Defender for Identity can monitor ADDDS-joined VMs but does not protect the ADDDS PaaS resource itself | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS requires public IP for Azure portal management connectivity; no disable-public-access toggle; network access controlled via NSG on the ADDDS subnet | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline
feature_supported=Not Applicable; EDR applies to customer-managed endpoints/VMs; ADDDS managed nodes not customer-accessible; not_applicable

feature_name: Key Management in Azure Key Vault
notes: feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not integrate with Key Vault for key management; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS managed service does not expose local admin accounts to customers; Microsoft manages the domain controller OS accounts; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_name: Local Authentication Methods for Data Plane Access
notes: LIVE→UNKNOWN: ADDDS supports Kerberos and NTLM local auth methods; NTLM can be restricted via fine-grained password policy but no ARM property to inspect remotely; verify via Azure Policy audit | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not support Managed Identity assignment; it is the identity provider, not a consumer of managed identity; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

microsoft_managed: ADDDS managed service backup is platform-enforced; frequency determined by SKU (hourly/daily); customer cannot configure | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

LIVE-DIRECT: NSG required on ADDDS dedicated subnet; NSG existence confirms compliance; do not validate individual rules (Microsoft-required rules are auto-applied) | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS is not a Private Link-capable service; it requires dedicated subnet within customer VNet | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

LIVE-DIRECT: ADDDS emits security audit logs (Kerberos auth, NTLM auth, LDAP bind); check DiagnosticSettings for log category enabled | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not support data discovery or classification; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

feature_supported=False; ADDDS does not support Service Principal authentication; management plane uses ARM RBAC; not_applicable | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline

microsoft_managed: ADDDS deploys into a dedicated subnet in customer VNet; VNet integration is required and platform-enforced | MCSB v3 baseline confirmed: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/azure-active-directory-domain-services-security-baseline
feature_supported=Not Applicable; Vulnerability Assessment targets customer VMs; ADDDS PaaS service not applicable
